security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* http://localhost:*; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Web security toolkit for bug bounty hunting
bundle.longDescription: Talon is a fast, modern web-security toolkit for solo bug bounty hunters. Proxy, replay, sitemap, fuzzer.
